title: Non-canonical envelope for registered tools health/capabilities
evidence: health/capabilities return ad hoc dict and are not represented by ToolResponse
M1 canonical map does not include these tools
why_it_matters: MCP clients cannot rely on a single response envelope across all exposed tools, increasing client-side branch complexity and drift risk.
recommended_fix: Define canonical contracts for health/capabilities (or mark as internal and remove exposure).
recommended_regression_guard: Add contract tests asserting every registered tool has a canonical model and emits ToolResponse-compatible shape.
